title: Secondary English Teaching & Curriculum Specialist
description:
About the Role
At illum.e, we are not just another tuition centre — we are Singapore’s most forward-thinking English education brand, known for our game-changing methodology and class-leading results. As a Secondary English Teaching & Curriculum Specialist, you will join the team driving this standard of excellence. This unique role blends teaching and curriculum innovation, designed for those who aspire to lead the future of English education in Singapore.


We are seeking the very best curriculum talents in the nation — educators with the creativity, rigour, and vision to keep illum.e at the forefront of English mastery.


Key Responsibilities

  • Teaching & Learning: Deliver illum.e’s signature Secondary English classes (Sec 1–4) with clarity, impact, and inspiration. Build student confidence and drive mastery beyond grades.
  • Curriculum Development: Work with our curriculum team to design and refine cutting-edge lesson materials, assessments, and resources that set national benchmarks in rigour and relevance.
  • Student Progression: Track student performance, adapt pedagogy, and ensure each learner achieves growth with excellence.
  • Collaboration: Partner closely with Curriculum Leads to identify gaps, propose innovations, and co-create modules that shape the future of Secondary English.
  • Leadership Pathway: Take part in professional growth initiatives that prepare you to step into Curriculum Lead roles, where you will shape vision, strategy, and team culture for Secondary English.

Who We’re Looking For

  • A strong command of English Teaching Curricula, with a genuine passion for teaching and shaping students' mastery of the language.
  • Visionary educators who want to set the standard for Secondary English in Singapore.
  • Growth-minded, collaborative, and driven to innovate.
  • Prior Secondary English teaching experience is valued; outstanding fresh talent with curriculum potential will also be considered.

Why illum.e?

Strong Brand, Strong Demand: We don’t chase students. Our reputation brings them to us
Proven Impact: Our students regularly top their schools and national exams, and come back to thank us
World-Class Materials: Every teacher is equipped with high-impact materials, scaffolds, and model essays with no last-minute scrambling
Culture of Mastery and Growth: High-performing team, low politics, and a culture of continuous feedback and mentorship
Clear Career Pathways: Whether you want to teach, lead, innovate, or scale EdTech, we’ve built the ladders
Future-Facing Brand: illum.e is rapidly expanding into AI tools, online learning, and overseas markets

Staff Benefits

  • Competitive salary, reviewed annually
  • Semester-based performance bonuses and retention incentives
  • Annual staff retreats, festive bonding events, and wellness perks
  • Full curriculum and marking support so you can teach with quality, not chaos
  • Fast-tracked growth opportunities into curriculum, academic leadership, or product development
  • Mentorship from experienced Leads, plus direct access to the CEO and Academic Directors
  • Paid training sessions and curriculum workshops
  • Two full rest days each week
  • Flexible work schedules based on availability

postedCompany.description: Thinkers' Vault is the umbrella company of various education and technology firms. Under the collective is illum.e and Pivot Physics, the most sought after tuition and enrichment centres in Singapore. As an MOE-registered centre, illum.e offers high quality, results proven English and IP Language Arts Tuition, Humanities Tuition for Primary and Secondary School and GP Tuition for Junior College in online and/ or physical lesson modes. As a specialised tuition centre, Pivot Physics provides high-quality, results-driven Physics tuition for O-Level, IP, and JC students, backed by an evolving SEAB-based curriculum and robust academic support.
postedCompany.name: THINKERS' VAULT PTE. LTD.
